![Deltakit](https://www.riverlane.com/media/v5ugiv0w/nav_deltakit.svg?height=48&v=1dc895853574d70)
The open-source software for developing and adopting Quantum Error Correction 
Using Deltakit, quantum developers can design, execute and benchmark realistic QEC schemes for all quantum computers regardless of hardware architecture. 
Designed as a universal and easy to adopt toolkit for engineers and developers at quantum computing companies and HPC centres, Deltakit contains circuit generation, noise simulation, error decoding and data analysis tools.
### Explore novel error   
correcting codes
Flexible and accessible tools to explore a variety of code and decoders.
### Add realistic noise   
models
Identify underlying sources of noise and implement adaptive strategies.
### Run stability and memory   
experiments
Conduct experiments that form the foundation of fault-tolerant circuits.
## What Deltakit provides at its core
Powerful tools for quantum error correction at every stage.
![Codes](https://www.riverlane.com/media/olsk0rvm/features_codes.svg?rmode=max&width=200&v=1dcb16a77c08e30)
###### Codes
Explore repetition, surface, toric, and bivariate bicycle codes.
![QPU & Noise Analysis](https://www.riverlane.com/media/wawnyryw/features_noise.svg?rmode=max&width=200&v=1dcb16a77d0e1e0)
###### QPU & Noise Analysis
Model noise, simulate leakage, and visualise effects.
![Experiments](https://www.riverlane.com/media/pnch2vuf/features_experiments.svg?rmode=max&width=200&v=1dcb16a77cbd8d0)
###### Experiments
Decoding a quantum memory experiment, STIM-compatible circuits.
Open Source

Surface code & qLDPC circuit generation

Memory and stability circuits

  * ![Smart QEC experiment execution list icon](https://www.riverlane.com/media/ie4olppc/checklist-icon.svg?rmode=max&width=100&v=1dcb16a77bb0ff0)
Smart QEC experiment execution
  * ![QEC results analysis list icon](https://www.riverlane.com/media/ie4olppc/checklist-icon.svg?rmode=max&width=100&v=1dcb16a77bb0ff0)
QEC results analysis
  * ![Extensions for circuit and graph manipulation list icon](https://www.riverlane.com/media/ie4olppc/checklist-icon.svg?rmode=max&width=100&v=1dcb16a77bb0ff0)
Extensions for circuit and graph manipulation


Cloud Services
  * ![Heralded leakage simulation list icon](https://www.riverlane.com/media/1znd5wow/cloud-icon.svg?rmode=max&width=100&v=1dcb16a77ae3eb0)
Heralded leakage simulation
Model and mitigate the effects of leakage events with high fidelity simulation tools
  * ![Leakage-aware decoding with LCD list icon](https://www.riverlane.com/media/1znd5wow/cloud-icon.svg?rmode=max&width=100&v=1dcb16a77ae3eb0)
Leakage-aware decoding with LCD
Improve decoding accuracy through leakage-aware techniques using our LCD decoder’s adaptive decoding functionality
  * ![Fast qLDPC decoding with BP-AC list icon](https://www.riverlane.com/media/1znd5wow/cloud-icon.svg?rmode=max&width=100&v=1dcb16a77ae3eb0)
Fast qLDPC decoding with BP-AC
Built for speed and precision in large-scale experiments

##  Latest Deltakit updates 
[ ![Forget guesswork: How error budgeting can boost your QEC performance ](https://www.riverlane.com/deltakit) Technical update Forget guesswork: How error budgeting can boost your QEC performance  11 February 2026 Adrien Suau, Senior Open-source Software Engineer ](https://www.riverlane.com/news/how-error-budgeting-can-boost-your-qec-performance) [ ![Riverlane launches Deltakit: a new software platform for learning and adopting Quantum Error Correction  ](https://www.riverlane.com/deltakit) Press release Riverlane launches Deltakit: a new software platform for learning and adopting Quantum Error Correction  17 September 2025 ](https://www.riverlane.com/press-release/riverlane-launches-deltakit-a-new-software-platform-for-qec) [ ![Quantum error correction is crucial, but the ecosystem isn’t ready ](https://www.riverlane.com/deltakit) Blog Quantum error correction is crucial, but the ecosystem isn’t ready  07 August 2025 ](https://www.riverlane.com/blog/quantum-error-correction-is-crucial-but-the-ecosystem-isn-t-ready)
[ Sign up for the latest updates Get Deltakit updates ](https://share-eu1.hsforms.com/1BRY_JNEISz6wdXoRDR4jfwf0ivj)
## Frequently asked questions
### Do I need access to a quantum computer to use Deltakit?
Deltakit works with the leading QEC simulator, Stim, to allow you to design and test QEC circuits in simulation without a QPU, with a variety of noise models. Of course, if you have access to a QPU, you can also use it to run QEC experiments and decode those results.
### Can I use Deltakit for real-time QEC?
Deltakit is built for offline and real-time QEC research. Offline (where you decode outside the coherence time of the qubits) and simulated QEC experiments are perfect for designing new codes, testing new QEC architectures and learning more about QEC. For fast decoding at low latencies and high throughput, Deltakit works with [Deltaflow](https://www.riverlane.com/deltaflow "Deltaflow") to allow you to run and decode QEC experiments on QPUs in real-time.
### What platforms does Deltakit support?
Deltakit is a python library and works on all major operating systems with support for Python 3.10 to Python 3.13. Check out our getting started guide [here](https://deltakit-docs.riverlane.com/en/stable/guide/getting_started.html "Riverlane Deltakit - Getting started").
### What’s the difference between Deltakit and Stim/pyMatching?
Deltakit is built from the ground up for QEC code construction, compilation, visualisation and results analysis. Deltakit uses industry-standard formats and interfaces with commonly used QEC tools like Stim for simulation, and pyMatching for software decoding.
### How can I report a bug/request a feature?
Please head to our [github repository](http://github.com/deltakit/deltakit "Deltakit on Github") and submit an issue. Alternatively, if you’d like to reach out to us privately with a bug, feature request or to discuss a collaboration, you can email deltakit@riverlane.com.
![](https://www.riverlane.com/media/ovznujs4/deltaflow-angle-front.jpg?rmode=max&width=800&quality=80&v=1dcb16b12393bb0)
![](https://www.riverlane.com/media/hipjiohs/deltaflow_logo_colour.svg?rmode=max&width=337&height=48)
### Ready to take QEC to real hardware?
Discover Deltaflow, the world’s leading QEC system for real-time quantum computing at utility scale.
[Discover Deltaflow](https://www.riverlane.com/deltaflow)
